summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TLS Advocate Membership Management System with new dark theme design. All major UI components and flows working correctly with beautiful Space Grotesk font, glassmorphism effects, and modern card-based layout.

ui_bugs.issue: Region dropdown has overlay interception issues requiring force clicks

passed_tests: Landing page loads with dark theme (#02040A background)
Space Grotesk font properly applied to headings
Glassmorphism cards (13 found) with proper styling
Navigation elements (login, register, verify buttons) working
Hero section with gradient gold text effects
Login page dark theme styling and form functionality
Admin login successful with provided credentials (admin@tls.or.tz)
Admin dashboard redirect and dark theme display
Register page complete advocate form with dark theme
Advocate dashboard displays with dark theme and user info
Dashboard stats and quick action cards working
Verification portal with clean dark theme interface
Glow effects and animations working properly
success_percentage: Frontend: 95% - All major features working with minor dropdown interaction issue
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Registration form region dropdown has overlay interception requiring force clicks. Consider improving dropdown accessibility or z-index layering.
